vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn/thanh tịnh dành cho cộng đồng
vocab.example: The addition of a community garden would serve as a communal sanctuary where residents could escape the noise of the main road.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy sự gắn kết xã hội
vocab.example: Expanding the number of public plazas is crucial to foster social cohesion among people from diverse backgrounds.

vocab.meaning: diện mạo/bức tranh tổng thể của đô thị
vocab.example: Integrating more open-air amphitheaters would add a vibrant cultural layer to our local urban tapestry.

vocab.meaning: đại lộ/lối đi thân thiện với người đi bộ
vocab.example: I would love to see more pedestrian-friendly thoroughfares that prioritize foot traffic over motorized vehicles.

vocab.meaning: khu dân cư trì trệ, thiếu sức sống
vocab.example: Without accessible parks or sports facilities, a district risks becoming a stagnant neighborhood with little to offer its youth.

vocab.meaning: nơi vui chơi giải trí (để giải tỏa năng lượng)
vocab.example: High-density residential areas desperately need more recreational outlets to improve the overall well-being of the inhabitants.
Building an architectural marvel like a modern public library would not only be functional but also a point of pride for our town.

vocab.meaning: công viên nhỏ (thường nằm xen kẽ trong các khu đất hẹp)
vocab.example: In a crowded city, even small pocket parks can significantly reduce the 'heat island' effect and provide a place to breathe.

vocab.meaning: tương tác/tiếp xúc với thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Urban planners should incorporate more wetlands or nature trails to allow city dwellers to interact with nature daily.

vocab.meaning: hồi sinh/làm mới một khu vực cụ thể
vocab.example: The proposal to build a new waterfront promenade is expected to completely revitalize the precinct and attract tourists.
